final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3:4 vertical nine-grid infographic poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic, magazine layout, soft flat illustration with light skeuomorphic touches
Composition: 3×3 grid layout with clear boundaries between cells, each cell self-contained and centered, generous white space, large readable Chinese text
Subject: sleep wellness tips guide titled "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (8 tips to fall asleep instantly)
Scene/backdrop: cream white, beige, oatmeal, light caramel color palette with deep brown text
Lighting/mood: warm, healing, calming sleep therapy theme
Color palette: cream white, beige, oatmeal, light caramel, deep brown text accents
Materials/textures: soft matte paper texture, gentle gradients
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: nine-grid layout with clear cell divisions, each grid cell must work as standalone image when cropped, all text in Chinese, no English, professional new media design aesthetic, no cheap marketing feel
Avoid: garish colors, cluttered layout, text overlapping grid lines, broken characters, English text
